calls.title: Opportunities in May 2026
calls.snippet: Residencies, fellowships, grants, and open calls from the Bennett Prize, Oak Spring Garden Foundation, and more in our monthly list of opportunities for artists, writers, and art workers.

calls.title: The Bennett Prize Opens Fifth Call for Entries
calls.snippet: Women figurative realist painters can enter to win $75,000 and a traveling solo exhibition. Applications are open through September 19.

calls.title: Opportunities in April 2026
calls.snippet: Residencies, fellowships, grants, and open calls from Banff Centre, the Vilcek Foundation, and more in our monthly list of opportunities for artists, writers, and art workers.

calls.title: Deepen Your Creative Practice at Vermont Studio Center
calls.snippet: Sessions include resident presentations, open studios, and the acclaimed Visiting Artist & Writer program. Applications are open for early 2027.

calls.title: Call for Applications: 2026 Craft Archive Fellowship
calls.snippet: The Center for Craft will award up to four $5,000 fellowships to support research on underrepresented craft histories, culminating in an article on Hyperallergic.

calls.title: Opportunities in March 2026
calls.snippet: Residencies, fellowships, grants, and open calls from Vermont Studio Center, the Japanese American National Museum, and more in our monthly list of opportunities for artists, writers, and art workers.

calls.title: The Rubin’s Annual Grant Program Funds Himalayan Art and Research
calls.snippet: The 2026 grant cycle opens February 16. Submit a letter of intent by March 6.

calls.title: Opportunities in February 2026
calls.snippet: Residencies, fellowships, grants, open calls, and jobs from the Helen Frankenthaler Foundation, the Rubin Museum, and more in our monthly list of opportunities for artists, writers, and art workers.

calls.title: Onassis AiR Opens Applications for 2026–27 Residencies in Athens
calls.snippet: Participants receive an artist’s fee, a research budget, housing, round-trip travel, mentoring, and other resources to support their work.

calls.title: Golschan Ahmad Haschemi Receives the Marie Zimmermann Fellowship for Dramaturgy 2026
Open Call for a Research Residency at Pivô Salvador in Salvador de Bahia, Brazil 2026
calls.snippet: Open Call for a Research Residency at Pivô Salvador in Salvador de Bahia, Brazil 2026

calls.title: Take Your Practice Further in a Visual Arts Residency at Banff Centre
calls.snippet: Engage with leading contemporary faculty, access exceptional studios, and develop your practice in Banff’s inspiring mountain setting.

calls.title: Frankenthaler Climate Initiative Opens Applications for Sixth Grant Cycle
calls.snippet: The program has awarded more than $17.5 million to US visual arts organizations pursuing energy efficiency assessments and projects.

calls.title: Request for Proposals: Operator for the Harlem African Burial Ground Cultural Education Center
calls.snippet: Learn about this opportunity to develop a cultural education center at the historic East Harlem site during informational sessions in January and February.

calls.title: Apply for NXTHVN’s Studio and Curatorial Fellowships
calls.snippet: Up to seven artists and two curators will participate in a paid, 10-month intensive residency in New Haven, Connecticut.

calls.title: Apply for Rent-Free Studio Space in Brooklyn Through the Sharpe-Walentas Studio Program
calls.snippet: The residency program awards 17 visual artists a year of rent-free studio space in New York City. Applications are due by January 15.

calls.title: The six projects of the 21th Web Residencies »Polymorphic Futures« have now been announced!
